Uses of Class
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api.Population

Packages that use Population
Package
Description
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms
Top-level algorithm drivers and reusable base classes.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.dynamic
Dynamic/noisy optimization EDA drivers.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api
Primary framework abstractions for algorithms, models, populations and optimization problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api.defaults
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.metrics
Core metric collectors and latent-knowledge analyzers.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Population<G>
    NichingPolicy.apply(Population<G> population, Representation<G> representation, RngStream rng)
    Applies niching post-processing to a population.
    Population<G>
    AlgorithmState.population()
     
    protected Population<G>
    AbstractEdaAlgorithm.postProcessPopulation(AlgorithmContext<G> context, Population<G> previous, Population<G> next)
    Allows algorithm-specific population post-processing after replacement, niching, and restarts (for example random immigrants injection).
    Population<G>
    ReplacementPolicy.replace(Population<G> current, List<Individual<G>> offspring, int elitism, ObjectiveSense sense)
    Returns the next generation population.
    Population<G>
    RestartPolicy.restart(AlgorithmState<G> state, Representation<G> representation, RngStream rng)
    Builds a restarted population.

    ReplacementPolicy.replace(Population<G> current, List<Individual<G>> offspring, int elitism, ObjectiveSense sense)
    Returns the next generation population.

    SelectionPolicy.select(Population<G> population, int count, RngStream rng)
    Selects a subset from the current population.
    protected abstract int
    AbstractEdaAlgorithm.selectionSize(AlgorithmContext<G> context, Population<G> population)
    Returns how many individuals are used for model fitting.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <G> LatentTelemetry
    LatentKnowledgeAnalyzer.analyze(Population<G> population, List<Individual<G>> elite, Model<G> model, LatentTelemetry previous, Map<String,Object> params)
    Computes representation-specific latent telemetry.
    static <G> double
    PopulationMetrics.best(Population<G> population)
    Returns the best scalar fitness in the population.
    static <G> double
    PopulationMetrics.diversity(Population<G> population)
    Diversity measured as fraction of unique genotype summaries.
    static <G> double
    PopulationMetrics.entropy(Population<G> population)
    Shannon entropy over genotype-summary frequencies.
    static <G> double
    PopulationMetrics.mean(Population<G> population)
    Returns arithmetic mean of scalar fitness values.
    static <G> double
    PopulationMetrics.std(Population<G> population)
    Returns standard deviation of scalar fitness values.
